subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out — we appreciate your interest in exploring a collaboration with our team.

I'd be happy to set up an introductory call. Here are some available slots that work on our end:

- Tuesday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
- Wednesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
- Thursday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Please let me know which slot works best for you, and I'll send over a calendar invite.

Regarding your request for our internal contact directory and direct phone lines for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not able to share that information. However, I'd be glad to facilitate introductions and include the right people on our side once we've had a chance to connect and better understand the scope of the collaboration.

Looking forward to speaking with you.

Best regards
